## Verification

- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] `uv run ruff check .`
- [ ] `uv run ruff format --check .`
- [ ] `uv run mypy src tests`

## AICO Checklist

- [ ] Single class < 500 lines and single method < 100 lines, or the exception is explained.
- [ ] New adapters, channels, or stores use protocol/interface boundaries.
- [ ] User-visible behavior has tests.
- [ ] `STATUS.md` and `docs/journal/ROUNDS.md` are updated when code changes.
- [ ] New pitfalls, blockers, or architecture decisions are documented.
